# Healthcare Compliance MCP Server

> **MCP Server for AI agents** | **Use on [Apify Store](https://apify.com)**

Medical device compliance intelligence for AI agents. Access FDA MAUDE adverse events, 510(k) clearances, device recalls, and ClinicalTrials.gov registry data.

## Quick Start

Add to your MCP client:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "healthcare-compliance-mcp": {
      "url": "https://healthcare-compliance-mcp.apify.actor/mcp"
    }
  }
}
```

No API key required. AI agents can call tools directly.

## Tools

### search_device_events
**Purpose:** Search FDA MAUDE database for adverse event reports on medical devices.
**When to call:** Persona: HIPAA compliance officer or medical device buyer. Scenario: Checking adverse event history for device risk assessment or vendor evaluation.
**Example AI prompt:** "Search FDA MAUDE for adverse event reports on insertable cardiac pacemakers from Medtronic in 2025."

### get_device_510k_clearance
**Purpose:** Get 510(k) premarket clearance details for FDA-approved devices.
**When to call:** Persona: FDA consultant or medical device buyer. Scenario: Verifying if a specific device has 510(k) clearance before procurement.
**Example AI prompt:** "Check if Boston Scientific has 510(k) clearance for coronary stent systems."

### get_device_recalls
**Purpose:** Search FDA device enforcement reports for recall notices.
**When to call:** Persona: Healthcare procurement specialist or compliance officer. Scenario: Checking for active recalls before vendor contract renewal.
**Example AI prompt:** "Find all FDA Class I and II recalls for insulin pump devices in the last 3 years."

### search_clinical_trials
**Purpose:** Search ClinicalTrials.gov registry for clinical trial information.
**When to call:** Persona: Biotech investor or clinical operations analyst. Scenario: Researching clinical trial landscape for a therapeutic area.
**Example AI prompt:** "Find all Phase 3 clinical trials for GLP-1 agonists that are currently recruiting."

### get_trial_details
**Purpose:** Get detailed information for a specific clinical trial by NCT ID.
**When to call:** Persona: Clinical operations analyst or medical affairs team. Scenario: Getting protocol and eligibility criteria for a specific trial.
**Example AI prompt:** "Get full details for clinical trial NCT05712345 including enrollment criteria and primary endpoints."

### screen_device_compliance
**Purpose:** Composite compliance risk score for a medical device combining adverse events, recalls, and 510(k) status.
**When to call:** Persona: Healthcare procurement specialist or VC analyst. Scenario: Screening a medical device for compliance risk before purchase or investment.
**Example AI prompt:** "Screen the compliance risk for Medtronic insulin pumps — check adverse events, recalls, and 510(k) status."

### assess_manufacturer_quality
**Purpose:** Multi-source quality assessment for a manufacturer across all device categories.
**When to call:** Persona: Vendor risk manager or compliance officer. Scenario: Assessing overall quality track record of a device manufacturer.
**Example AI prompt:** "Assess Medtronic's quality track record across all medical device categories."

### generate_compliance_report
**Purpose:** Full compliance intelligence report combining all FDA data sources.
**When to call:** Persona: HIPAA compliance officer or regulatory affairs specialist. Scenario: Generating comprehensive report for HIPAA security risk assessment.
**Example AI prompt:** "Generate a full compliance intelligence report for coronary stent devices including 510(k) status, recalls, and adverse events."

## Data Sources

| Source | API |
|--------|-----|
| FDA MAUDE | api.fda.gov/device/event.json |
| FDA 510(k) | api.fda.gov/device/510k.json |
| FDA Enforcement | api.fda.gov/device/enforcement.json |
| ClinicalTrials.gov | clinicaltrials.gov/api/v2/studies |

## Pricing

PPE (Pay-Per-Event) — $0.03-$0.15 per tool call. No API key required.

## SEO Keywords

FDA MAUDE, 510(k) clearance, medical device compliance, FDA adverse event reports, ClinicalTrials.gov, HIPAA compliance, no API key needed, AI agent, MCP server, healthcare compliance automation, medical device screening
